description: A candid color group photograph (no on-image text or design) from the DHS Juneteenth flag-raising event. Seven people in business attire pose together smiling on a red-brick circular walkway in a green landscaped garden with trees, flagpoles, and a parked car in the background. The group includes several men in dark and tan suits and women in green and patterned dresses, with a woman in a black blazer and lanyard at center. This is a posed-but-candid event/portrait photo documenting attendees, not a designed meme or graphic; mark is_designed=false.
